title: AutoSell
description: Lightweight automated item selling for modern multiplayer Minecraft servers.
body:
# AutoSell

[![Mod Loader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Mod%20Loader-Fabric-red)](https://fabricmc.net)
[![Environment](https://img.shields.io/badge/Environment-Client-purple)]()
[![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/autosellmod?color=00AF5C&label=downloads&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/mod/autosellmod)
[![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/Uhuli/AutoSell)](LICENSE)

*Automatically sell items on your desired server - without ever using your fingers.*

---

## Overview

**AutoSell** automates the entire selling process in a clean and seamless way — while staying fully aligned with vanilla gameplay mechanics.

Select the item you want to sell, configure a threshold, and the mod will take care of the rest.

Once your inventory reaches the defined fill level, AutoSell will:
- Execute your `/sell` command automatically
- Move items into the inventory using normal player-like interactions
- Complete the selling process step by step
- Close the interface when finished

All actions are performed in a natural and unobtrusive way, ensuring smooth integration with existing server systems.

## Contributing

Contributions are welcome! Whether it's bug fixes, new features, or optimizations, you can help make **AutoSell** better.  

### How to contribute:
1. Fork the repository  
2. Create a new branch with a descriptive name  
3. Make your changes  
4. Submit a pull request with a clear description of your changes  

Please ensure your code follows the existing style and passes any tests before submitting.  

---

## Issues

If you encounter any bugs, errors, or unexpected behavior:  

- Open a new issue on GitHub with a clear title  
- Include steps to reproduce the problem  
- Attach logs or screenshots if relevant  

I actively monitor issues and try to respond as quickly as possible.  

---

## Feature Requests

Want to see a new feature in AutoSell?  

- Open a new issue on GitHub and label it as a `feature request`  
- Provide a detailed description and use case  
- Discuss implementation ideas if possible  

Community suggestions are highly appreciated and may be included in future releases.
